title: SwiftSend
description: Email automation tool that generates personalized email drafts from CSV data. Streamlines bulk email workflows by importing contact information and message templates, then outputting formatted emails ready for review and sending.

title: MiniGolf
description: Browser-based mini golf game built with HTML5 Canvas. Features pass-and-play multiplayer mode and custom course editor. Players can design their own courses with obstacles, hazards, and custom layouts, then share and play them.

title: Quoridor
description: Full implementation of the strategic board game Quoridor with multiple AI difficulty levels and online multiplayer. Features pathfinding algorithms for move validation, minimax-based AI opponents, and real-time game state synchronization for multiplayer matches.

title: AudioVisual Computer Vision
description: Research project at SHAC Lab analyzing how brain activity changes based on visual access to a speaker's mouth. Combines computer vision models for processing first-person POV video with 3D neuroimaging data. Uses custom RNN architectures to correlate visual speech cues with neural responses.
